title: common-client
description: Per-firm identity collected by the onboarding wizard. Per PRODUCT-SPEC §5.3 line 357.

firm_slug.description: Must equal common-base.tenant_slug. Duplicated for clarity in firm-facing tooling.

legal_name.description: Full legal name; surfaces in tenant footer of every CLAUDE.md.

trading_name.description: Optional trading-as name; defaults to legal_name if absent.

tier.description: Pricing tier; gates agent count per PRODUCT-SPEC tier matrix.

deployment_preference.description: Sovereign = on-prem cluster; cloud = managed Hetzner. Per master brief §4.

operating_window.description: Drives agent Tier 1/2/3 classification per master brief §2.4 primitive 1.
